product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring Seal
product.description: Serving as a crucial component in your drainage system, this JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring Seal is designed to ensure a watertight and secure connection between Twinwall drain pipes when used with Twinwall couplers. Made from durable rubber construction, it is available in a range of diameters to fit your installation requirements.Crafted from lightweight yet durable HDPE plastic, the Twinwall drainage pipes come in a range of sizes from 100mm to an impressive 3000mm in diameter. Designed through a cutting-edge twin extrusion process, where two layers are expertly extruded and fused seamlessly, they boast superior construction. The outer layer showcases a robust corrugated design, enhancing structural strength and minimising the risk of on-site damage. The inner wall boasts a sleek, seamless finish that facilitates smooth hydraulic flow, a stark contrast to traditional single-wall pipes prone to silt accumulation.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring SealAvailable in a range of diametersEnsures a watertight and secure connectionFor use with JFC Twinwall Couplers and Drain PipesResistant to naturally occurring chemicalsVersatile installation depths, ranging from 0.5 to 10 metresCost-effective due to reduced plant and labour requirementsMinimal waste compared to conventional pipesLightweight and easy to installThanks to the longer 6-metre sections, the Twinwall pipes ensure a swift installation process, reducing the need for numerous joints. With straightforward cutting, they are easily customisable on-site. There is also a comprehensive range of bends, angles and junctions available to suit any project.Standards & CertificationBBA and HAPAS Roads and Bridges Agrément: Certificate No. 02/H069Please note: When using a Twinwall coupler, two ring seals are required.

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 6000mm
product.description: Available in a range of diameters and with or without perforations to suit your installation needs, this JFC CorriPipe™ offers the perfect solution for effective surface drainage. Manufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plastic, this Twinwall Drainage Pipe is a product of precision manufacturing.Through a cutting-edge twin extrusion process, two layers seamlessly intertwine and are heat welded together in a single continuous step, ensuring durability and reliability. The outer layer boasts a corrugated design, enhancing its structural integrity and reducing the risk of on-site damage. Meanwhile, the inner wall features a smooth, seamless finish that optimises hydraulic flow, eliminating the headache of silt accumulation that plagues traditional single-wall pipes.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 6000mmFor surface water drainageManufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plasticInnovative twin extrusion process ensure durabilityCorrugated outer wall for added structural strengthSmooth inner wall for optimal hydraulic flow and no silt buildupLightweight with a generous 6-metre length for easy installationReduces labour and plant costs with fewer jointsResistant to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicalsSuitable for various soil conditions (depths from 0.5 to 10 metres*)Thanks to its lightweight construction and generous length of 6 metres, this product facilitates a swift and hassle-free installation process. This not only saves you time but also minimises labour and plant costs due to fewer required joints. Plus, its resistance to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicals makes it suitable for various soil conditions. A full range of fittings and accessories are also readily available to complete your drainage system.Please note: *The maximum cover depths for CorriPipe™ are typically between 6 and 10 metres when installed in accordance with series 500 of the MCDHW Volume 1 as detailed in the CorriPipe™ BBA certificate.

Manufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plastic, this Twinwall Drainage Pipe is a product of precision manufacturing.Through a cutting-edge twin extrusion process, two layers seamlessly intertwine and are heat welded together in a single continuous step, ensuring durability and reliability. The outer layer boasts a corrugated design, enhancing its structural integrity and reducing the risk of on-site damage. Meanwhile, the inner wall features a smooth, seamless finish that optimises hydraulic flow, eliminating the headache of silt accumulation that plagues traditional single-wall pipes.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 6000mmFor surface water drainageManufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plasticInnovative twin extrusion process ensure durabilityCorrugated outer wall for added structural strengthSmooth inner wall for optimal hydraulic flow and no silt buildupLightweight with a generous 6-metre length for easy installationReduces labour and plant costs with fewer jointsResistant to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicalsSuitable for various soil conditions (depths from 0.5 to 10 metres*)Thanks to its lightweight construction and generous length of 6 metres, this product facilitates a swift and hassle-free installation process. This not only saves you time but also minimises labour and plant costs due to fewer required joints. Plus, its resistance to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicals makes it suitable for various soil conditions. A full range of fittings and accessories are also readily available to complete your drainage system.Please note: *The maximum cover depths for CorriPipe™ are typically between 6 and 10 metres when installed in accordance with series 500 of the MCDHW Volume 1 as detailed in the CorriPipe™ BBA certificate.

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Y Unequal Branch for Surface Water Drainage
product.description: Designed to create a branch from a surface water drainage main line at a 45° angle, JFC Manufacturing's Twinwall drain pipe Y unequal branch is a triple socket section manufactured from HDPE plastic. Manufactured by a twin extrusion process, which means having two layers simultaneously extruded, a strong and durable structure is assured. The process is performed once inside and the other heat welded together in a continuous process. The outer wall is also corrugated for exceptional strength, reducing the potential for on-site damage to occur. As opposed to the inner wall which is smooth with a seamless finish to assist hydraulic flow. Better yet, the modern design means that unlike traditional single-wall pipes it will prevent slit accumulation. Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Y Unequal Branch for Surface Water DrainageLightweight for easy handling and transportation on-siteCan be installed at depths from 0.5 to 10 metresTwin walled and corrugated for strong structureSmooth inner wall supports increased flow capacityCan be combined with a full range of bends of all angles and both equal and unequal junctions are also availableResistant to naturally occurring chemicalsPlant and labour cost reductionEliminates waste compared to traditional pipesEasy to cut to length if requiredThe branch complies with HAPAS Roads and Bridges Agrément Certificate No. 02/H069, is BBA approved and, if installed correctly with three sealing rings, a watertight system is achievable. If it is too long, you can also cut the branch as needed to fit accordingly. Please note: Suitable for surface water drainage only.

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Surface Water Drainage Double Socket Bend
product.description:
HDPE double socket twinwall bends. For use with twinwall pipe to create a rigid bends. If installed with 2 sealing rings a watertight system can be achieved.
For surface water applications only. Complies with HAPAS BBA.
Twin Wall drainage pipe is made from HDPE plastic and is available from 100mm to 3000mm diameters. Manufactured by a twin extrusion process in which two layers are simultaneously extruded, one inside the other and heat welded together in one continuous process. The outer wall is corrugated providing excellent structural strength which reduces the possibility of on-site damage. The inner wall has a smooth seamless finish to assist hydraulic flow. This design, unlike traditional single-wall pipe prevents silt accumulation.
Benefits of Twin Wall include:

Lightweight 6 metre long lengths
Strong (Twin Walled & corrugated)
Smooth inner wall for increased flow capacity
Resistant to naturally occuring chemicals
Can be installed at depths from 0.5 to 10 metres
BBA and HAPAS Roads & Bridges Agrément Certificate No. 02/H069
Reduced plant & labour costs
Faster installation as 6 metre lengths mean fewer joints
Elimination of waste compared to traditional pipe
Pipe is easily cut to size requirements on site
A full range of bends of all angles & both equal & unequal junctions are also available

product.name: Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description: Graf's One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant, which will require a power source, is designed to treat wastewater so it is clean and safe enough to discharge into a nearby watercourse. With near-silent performance, odourless operation and a discreet design that features as little technology as possible, the low-maintenance One2Clean plant will only require emptying approximately every year.With various tank sizes to choose from within the range, One2Clean will provide efficient and cost-effective sewage treatment for five to eighteen people.Features & Benefits: Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment PlantDesigned to treat wastewater so it is clean and safe enough to discharge into a nearby watercourseAvailable in various sizesNear-silent performanceOdourless operationDiscreet design with a flat cover that sits flush with the groundFeatures as little technology as possibleLow-maintenance - will only require emptying approximately every yearFully assembled upon delivery for easy installationPerfect for all groundwater environmentsPedestrian and vehicle loading covers available25-year shell warrantyThis range features covers that are available in different weight class options to suit your project requirements. Whether you need pedestrian loading or vehicle loading covers, the Graf One2Clean Sewage Treatment Plant will provide an efficient, low-energy consuming sewage treatment solution. The flat surface allows for flush ground installation and the adjustable height allows you to make small height corrections on-site.Please note: The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer's instructions.The water discharged from the One2Clean packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard, which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.Numerous companies can dispose of the waste and they must be a registered waste carrier.

product.name: Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plant from Graf will treat the water, so that it is clean enough to be discharged into a water course (depending on how frequently it is being used and the manufacturer’s guidelines). However, One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plants do require a power source and requires emptying approximately every year.
The water discharged from the One2Clean Plus packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.
Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant Process

Untreated waste enters the One2Clean tank via the inlet on the side.
Wastewater then falls directly into the biological zone where the treatment takes place, allowing micro-organisms to start the breakdown process.
Compressed air is used initially for aeration through the diffuser, intermittent to achieve the best treatment performance.
Aeration is then stopped allowing the activated waste to sink to the bottom.
Compressed air is sent through the One2Clean tank once again, extracting the cleaned water near the surface.
This water passes through a sampling point before leaving the plant, where samples can be taken to confirm the quality of effluent.
The above process occurs twice per day, each lasting 12 hours.
The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer’s instructions
Numerous companiescan dispose of the waste, these must be a registered waste carrier

Features & Benefits

One tank with just one chamber
Less energy consumption
No mechanical elements in the wastewater
No pumps in the wastewater
No electrical components in the wastewater
Incredibly low volume of sewage sludge
Odourless, clear treated water for extraction
State-of-the-art manufacturing for maximum stability
100% watertight and corrosion-resistant
Can be installed in groundwater
Simple maintenance via an integrated, self-cleaning sampling container
More advanced control panel than the standard One2Clean
Control panel allows additional plug in retro fitting of add on systems
product.variant_name: Graf One2Clean Xtra Sewage Treatment Plant 5 Person with Pedestrian Lid

product.description:
The One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plant from Graf will treat the water, so that it is clean enough to be discharged into a water course (depending on how frequently it is being used and the manufacturer’s guidelines). However, One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plants do require a power source and requires emptying approximately every year.
The water discharged from the One2Clean Plus packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.
Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant Process

Untreated waste enters the One2Clean tank via the inlet on the side.
Wastewater then falls directly into the biological zone where the treatment takes place, allowing micro-organisms to start the breakdown process.
Compressed air is used initially for aeration through the diffuser, intermittent to achieve the best treatment performance.
Aeration is then stopped allowing the activated waste to sink to the bottom.
Compressed air is sent through the One2Clean tank once again, extracting the cleaned water near the surface.
This water passes through a sampling point before leaving the plant, where samples can be taken to confirm the quality of effluent.
The above process occurs twice per day, each lasting 12 hours.
The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer’s instructions
Numerous companiescan dispose of the waste, these must be a registered waste carrier

Features & Benefits

One tank with just one chamber
Less energy consumption
No mechanical elements in the wastewater
No pumps in the wastewater
No electrical components in the wastewater
Incredibly low volume of sewage sludge
Odourless, clear treated water for extraction
State-of-the-art manufacturing for maximum stability
100% watertight and corrosion-resistant
Can be installed in groundwater
Simple maintenance via an integrated, self-cleaning sampling container
More advanced control panel than the standard One2Clean
Control panel allows additional plug in retro fitting of add on systems

product.name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: Designed for outdoor cleaning and irrigation purposes, the Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvesting system by Graf is ideal for collecting rainwater from the roof of your property and then feeding it into the underground tank via the downpipes. Available in various sizes, you can use the harvester for domestic or commercial use with the choice of either an A15 lid for pedestrian use or a B125 cast iron lid for light vehicular use.Before entering the underground tank, the water passes through a filter to remove debris, ensuring clear water for use. An underground pressure-sensitive pump is also installed. When a valve or tap is opened, the water is pumped under pressure until the valve is closed allowing the system to re-pressurise and turn off the power to the pump.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester PackageLightweight for easy handling and transportationEasy and safe to assembleA15 and B125 lid options and choice of harvester sizes availableEPDM used to profile sealings and ensure minimum life of 25 yearsConstant monitoring of production ensures consistent qualitySuitable for vehicle loading when a telescopic cast iron cover is usedTwo additional hose-lock connection extraction pointsFilter prevents leaves, moss and debris from travelling with the rainwater out of the tankFilter package 2 consists of an internal Universal Filter 3, an inflow stilling system for controlling the water inflow as well as a Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard and an Overflow siphon. The Integra Inox Submersible pump features an automatic start/stop function with a floating water extraction unit and protection against dry running.Please note: If you have an above-ground tank, you can use a pump to extract the rainwater. However, if the tank is underground, you'll need a pump to extract the rainwater. It's important to consider what you'll be using the harvested rainwater for, as this will determine whether you need a backup function for periods where little rainwater is collected.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package 2700L with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: The Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package is available in various sizes for efficient rainwater harvesting. Whether for residential or commercial use, this system is designed to collect rainwater from building roofs, providing a cost-effective and eco-friendly water source for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaning.Choose between an A15 lid suitable for pedestrian areas or a B125 cast iron lid designed for light vehicular use, tailoring the system to your specific needs. The Graf Carat Direct system incorporates an innovative filtration process that varies based on the roof's surface area, preventing leaves, moss, and debris from entering the storage tank and ensuring the purity of the collected rainwater.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester PackageOffers efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly rainwater harvesting in various sizesFor residential and commercial applicationsChoose between A15 or B125 lids to suit pedestrian or light vehicular areasInnovative filtration prevents debris from entering the tankProvides water for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaningReliability is enhanced with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted serviceLightweight, easy to transport and safe assemblyEPDM to profile sealings lasts more than 25 yearsOnce securely stored in the tank, rainwater is easily extracted. Above-ground tanks feature a simple tap for convenient access, like a standard water butt, while underground tanks utilise pumps tailored to different applications. To enhance reliability, the Graf Carat Direct system can be equipped with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted service during periods of limited rainwater collection. Supplied with a mains water top-up unit measure the level of water in the underground tank.

The Graf Carat Direct system incorporates an innovative filtration process that varies based on the roof's surface area, preventing leaves, moss, and debris from entering the storage tank and ensuring the purity of the collected rainwater.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester PackageOffers efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly rainwater harvesting in various sizesFor residential and commercial applicationsChoose between A15 or B125 lids to suit pedestrian or light vehicular areasInnovative filtration prevents debris from entering the tankProvides water for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaningReliability is enhanced with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted serviceLightweight, easy to transport and safe assemblyEPDM to profile sealings lasts more than 25 yearsOnce securely stored in the tank, rainwater is easily extracted. Above-ground tanks feature a simple tap for convenient access, like a standard water butt, while underground tanks utilise pumps tailored to different applications. To enhance reliability, the Graf Carat Direct system can be equipped with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted service during periods of limited rainwater collection. Supplied with a mains water top-up unit measure the level of water in the underground tank.

product.name: Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plants by Graf are always a good choice. They are flexibly adapted to meet the stricter discharge values in water protection areas. No live parts need to be installed in the Klaro E Professional. Movement processes are created by three air lift pumps that are operated using a compressor which is built into the control.
The Graf Klaro E Professional wastewater treatment system does not need consistent integration of live technology in the tank. Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plant can be flexibly adjusted to changing conditions by altering the cycle times. The air pressure holes are colour coded to avoid installation errors; the whole system just needs to be fitted to the baffle of the reservoir.
Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant Features & Benefits

No live technology in the reservoir
Air compressor is very durable and whisper-quiet
Flexible, as expandable
Can be switched to holiday mode
Easy to install
Low maintenance
10-year warranty on sewage reservoirs
2-year warranty on technology

product.name: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron Lid
product.description: Graf Carat septic tanks extract floating and removable material domestic wastewater. This is pure mechanical cleaning, for which you need 500 ltrs of capacity per inhabitant. If you assume a volume of 150 ltrs, the wastewater passes through the system in 3 days.These septic tanks must have a total volume of at least 2000 ltrs. A 2000 ltr system is sufficient for 4 inhabitants, another 500 ltrs, must be incorporated for each additional inhabitant.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron LidLow weight: can also be installed in difficult local conditions without a craneLow maintenance: maintenance or cleaning work can be performed through the shaftsTanks can be used as rainwater harvesting systems after thorough cleaningPlease note: This tank will be delivered fully assembled.

The low weight of the tank makes it easy to transport, and its groundwater stability up to the tank shoulder adds durability.Features & Benefits: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile Sizes range from 1500 to 7500 litres, offering versatile options for various needsDesigned for efficient rainwater collection, with a quick and cost-effective installation process due to minimum depthIntegrated filter ensures water purityLightweight design for easy transport15-year warrantyWith the option of combining it with a cast iron telescope, the Platin tank becomes drivable by cars, enhancing its adaptability. Filter package 2 includes an internal Universal Filter 3, inflow stilling system, Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard, and Overflow siphon for comprehensive water management.Equipped with the Integra Inox Submersible pump, the tank boasts an automatic start/stop function, a floating water extraction unit, and protection against dry running. Additionally, enjoy peace of mind with a 15-year warranty, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability. Kit Contents1 x Platin Tank1 x Telescopic Mini PE Lid, Pedestrian loading, Green1 x Overflow Siphon1 x Internal Universal Filter 3, Inflow Stilling System1 x Spannfix Connection Sleeve1 x Water Hose Connection Box1 x Intergra Submersible Pump1 x 10m Roll of pressure hose1 x Rodent Guard
product.variant_name: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile 5000L
